name: Prep KDP upload workflow on PC
description: Caleb task — walk through the KDP upload UI to get to the publish-ready state (cover, interior, metadata all set). Stops at the actual 'Publish' button — that's always Jed.
trigger_examples: prep the kdp upload for motivation for tough guys
get the kdp draft ready to publish
prompt_template: Caleb: open kdp.amazon.com → Bookshelf → 'Motivation for Tough Guys' → Continue Setup. Upload the cover from D:\\Books\\MFTG\\cover.pdf, the interior from D:\\Books\\MFTG\\interior.pdf, fill metadata from D:\\Books\\MFTG\\metadata.json. Save as draft. Screenshot the publish-ready state and return to Solomon. DO NOT click Publish.
escalation_conditions: any of cover/interior/metadata missing in D:\\Books\\MFTG\\
KDP shows validation errors after fill
Publish button is the next step — escalate Jed before clicking
caleb_steps: Screenshot + return — STOP, do not publish
notes: Prep only — explicitly stops at the Publish button. The irreversible Publish step lives in jed_escalate_kdp_publish (handler: jed-escalate, categories: irreversible+public_brand).
